segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yeah, just this water and sandwich, please.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Very long. I just got in, so I'm trying to wake up a little.

segments.speaker: Cashier
segments.text: I hear you. That'll be $12.40. You can tap whenever you're ready.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. The screen is asking about a tip, right?

segments.speaker: Cashier
segments.text: Yep, just make a selection and it'll go through.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. Could I get a bag too? I have too much luggage.

segments.speaker: Cashier
segments.text: Sure. Do you need the receipt?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, please. Thanks. Have a good one.
